distribution_policy.summary: Keep downloaded datasets and copied media artifacts local. Ship only metadata/code plus curated subsets when the source license clearly permits redistribution.
distribution_policy.tracked_media_policy: Do not track downloaded source trees or copied third-party media in git.

datasets.name: FLIR ADAS Thermal Dataset
datasets.access: manual registration and local path only
datasets.notes: Registration-gated thermal frames. Users must download from FLIR and set FLIR_ADAS_DIR. SGXEM must not redistribute FLIR frames, annotations, transformed media, or embeddings.

datasets.name: NASA FIRMS (Fire Information for Resource Management System)
datasets.notes: Open thermal anomaly records. Small sample CSV/GeoJSON outputs can be committed; full fetches should use the API key.

datasets.name: ESC-50: Dataset for Environmental Sound Classification
datasets.license: CC BY-NC 3.0 full dataset; ESC-10 subset is CC BY 3.0
datasets.notes: Use git clone for local source data. Prefer ESC-10 classes for redistributable SGXEM artifacts; ESC-50-only classes remain non-commercial/local-only.

datasets.name: DroneAudioDataset
datasets.notes: Local experiments may clone the public repo, but SGXEM must not redistribute wav files, selected subsets, transformed media, or embeddings until upstream publishes an explicit license.

datasets.name: MAD - Military Audio Dataset
datasets.credential_env: KAGGLE_USERNAME/KAGGLE_KEY optional if using Kaggle mirror
datasets.notes: Use the official CC BY 4.0 source as authority. Include attribution in releases.

datasets.name: NYU Depth V2
datasets.notes: Download with datasets.load_dataset('sayakpaul/nyu_depth_v2'). Small curated RGB/depth subsets may be redistributed with attribution.

datasets.name: KITTI Vision Benchmark Suite
datasets.access: manual registration and local path only
datasets.notes: Users must download KITTI themselves and set KITTI_RAW_DIR. SGXEM must not redistribute KITTI frames, LiDAR, or embeddings.

text_sources.description: Acoustic/thermal detection ranges for 6+ vehicle classes with distractor entries
IR persistence times for 5+ platform types after engine shutdown
Rotor counts, dimensions, MTOW for 8+ drone platforms
Standoff distances and response protocols for 6+ event types
Frequency bands and acoustic signatures for 8+ source types
Intrusion rules, detection thresholds for 5+ depth/terrain conditions
